#include <fstream>$
#include <iostream>$
#include <unordered_map>$
#include <regex>$
#include <cctype>$
$
// M-fM-^XM- M-eM-0M-^DM-eM-.M-^ZM-dM-9M-^IM-oM-<M-^LM-eM-0M-^FANTLRM-gM-^ZM-^DtokenTypeNameM-fM-^XM- M-eM-0M-^DM-eM-^HM-0clangM-gM-^ZM-^DM-fM- M-<M-eM-<M-^O$
std::unordered_map<std::string, std::string> tokenTypeMapping = {$
  { "Void", "void" },$
  { "Int", "int" },$
  { "Return", "return" },$
  { "If", "if" },$
  { "Else", "else" },$
  { "While", "while" },$
  { "Break", "break" },$
  { "Continue", "continue" },$
  { "Identifier", "identifier" },$
  { "LeftParen", "l_paren" },$
  { "RightParen", "r_paren" },$
  { "RightBrace", "r_brace" },$
  { "LeftBrace", "l_brace" },$
  { "LeftBracket", "l_square" },$
  { "RightBracket", "r_square" },$
  { "Constant", "numeric_constant" },$
  { "Semi", "semi" },$
  { "EOF", "eof" },$
  { "Equal", "equal" },$
  { "EqualEqual", "equalequal" },$
  { "NotEqual", "exclaim_equal" },$
  { "Less", "less" },$
  { "Greater", "greater" },$
  { "LessEqual", "lessequal" },$
  { "GreaterEqual", "greaterequal" },$
  { "Plus", "plus" },$
  { "Minus", "minus" },$
  { "Star", "star" },$
  { "Slash", "slash" },$
  { "Percent", "percent" },$
  { "Exclaim", "exclaim" },$
  { "AmpAmp", "ampamp" },$
  { "PipePipe", "pipepipe" },$
  { "Amp", "amp" },$
  { "Pipe", "pipe" },$
  { "Comma", "comma" },$
};$
$
// Global state for tracking file/line/column from line directives$
struct LocationState {$
  std::string currentFile;$
  int currentLine = 1;$
  int currentColumn = 1;$
  bool atLineStart = true;$
  bool hasLeadingSpace = false;$
};$
$
static LocationState g_loc;$
$
// Parse line directive and update location state$
// Returns true if the line is a line directive$
bool parseLineDirective(const std::string& line) {$
  // Match: # number "filename" [flags]$
  std::regex re(R"(^\s*#\s*(\d+)\s+"([^"]*)".*)", std::regex::ECMAScript);$
  std::smatch match;$
  if (std::regex_match(line, match, re)) {$
    g_loc.currentLine = std::stoi(match[1].str());$
    g_loc.currentFile = match[2].str();$
    g_loc.currentColumn = 1;$
    g_loc.atLineStart = true;$
    g_loc.hasLeadingSpace = false;$
    return true;$
  }$
  return false;$
}$
$
void$
print_token(const antlr4::Token* token,$
            const antlr4::CommonTokenStream& tokens,$
            std::ofstream& outFile,$
            const antlr4::Lexer& lexer)$
